def negative_logger_instance_created_inside_function_body():
    rule_id = "logger_instance_created_inside_function_body"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag functions that create loggers repeatedly instead of reusing module-level logger references."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
